when: reading or writing task state is in scope
purpose: Resolve the configured vault and perform bounded task-artifact I/O

when: a gap result must be recoverable by the next workflow stage
purpose: Update research, the task index, and one verified gap-drill event through the Obsidian skill

when: linked notes, repositories, and source candidates must be located
purpose: Discover bounded candidate paths within explicit roots

when: exact claims, symbols, and note content need verification
purpose: Retrieve bounded textual evidence without dumping a workspace

when: a gap crosses callers, consumers, or repository boundaries
the gap includes a URL, remote repository, issue, review, or portal artifact
purpose: Read an applicable remote source without hardcoding a provider

when: version-sensitive API, protocol, language, or tool behavior matters
purpose: Verify current authoritative behavior instead of relying on memory

when: provenance or prior implementation decisions can discriminate options
purpose: Inspect bounded local history as evidence

when: terminology differs or configured knowledge retrieval needs conceptual matching
purpose: Rank conceptual candidates, then verify them against source Markdown

when: independent opinions materially improve a high-impact or ambiguous gap
purpose: Run bounded scout/challenger branches with the active model policy
